name: GIGABYTE B550 GAMING X V2 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4400(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - DVI-D - Realtek GbE LAN - Q-Flash Plus Button
shortName: GIGABYTE B550 GAMING X V2 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: Mid-range ATX motherboard for AMD Ryzen processors with B550 chipset, PCIe 4.0 support, and HDMI 2.1 output.
